title: esp32e22-fw manifest
description: Schema for the release manifest of the esp32e22-fw repository.

chip.description: Target chip identifier. Always 'esp32e22' for this repository.

version.description: Monotonically increasing firmware version. 0 is reserved as a non-official placeholder; official releases start at 1.

build_date.description: Firmware build timestamp in ISO 8601 (UTC), for example '2026-04-20T12:34:56Z'.

repo.description: Name of the firmware source repository. Always 'esp-firmware-system'.

commit.description: 8-character short commit SHA in esp-firmware-system from which the firmware was built.

branch.description: Branch name in esp-firmware-system at build time. Optional but recommended.

features.description: Functional features supported by the firmware.

secure_download.description: Whether this firmware supports Secure Download.
